rankings.title: Importing What You Used to Make: Energy-Cost-Driven Import Substitution in European Manufacturing After the 2022 Gas Shock
conditions: moving to finer HS codes
separating import rerouting from domestic-collapse substitution
making persistence/welfare central rather than optional

rankings.title: Creative Destruction or Just Destruction? Enterprise Deaths and the Permanent Restructuring of European Manufacturing After the 2022 Gas Shock
No Registration, No Market: The REACH 2018 Deadline and Chemical Industry Restructuring
Idea 1: Importing What You Used to Make: Energy-Cost-Driven Import Substitution
conditions: demonstrating perfectly flat pre-trends in the triple-diff event study

rankings.title: Idea 3: No Registration, No Market: The REACH 2018 Deadline
conditions: abandoning the C22-C25 control group in favor of a different identification strategy
ideally using firm-level microdata like Orbis to compare firms just above/below the tonnage thresholds

rankings.title: Idea 2: Creative Destruction or Just Destruction? Enterprise Deaths
Importing What You Used to Make: Energy-Cost-Driven Import Substitution in European Manufacturing After the 2022 Gas Shock
conditions: using quantities or deflated values rather than nominal imports
ruling out direct Russia-supplier substitution
other wartime confounds
showing persistence with domestic production
ideally
firm-capacity outcomes
